## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and resource alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposes reducing meeting frequency to once per week (Thursdays) due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues remain the primary blocker for blog performance; migration work ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Blog performance shows positive growth trends since January despite technical challenges](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [GrowthX CEO may reach out to Abhishek directly to discuss engagement fit and resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

## Topics

### Resource Alignment and Meeting Cadence

  - [GrowthX proposes reducing meeting frequency to Thursdays only due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Firework is currently one of GrowthX's lower-paying customers, necessitating a reassessment of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Post-migration, calls expected to return to regular performance reporting without technical fire-fighting](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [GrowthX CEO may contact Abhishek directly to discuss engagement fit and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Technical SEO and Migration Progress

  - [Cameron working on prerequisite tasks for major site changes (e.g., landing pages, redirects)](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Coordination challenges with infrastructure team in India/China causing some delays](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Focus on fixing canonical tags, sitemaps, and domain consolidation](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Plans to prioritize indexing of new Webflow landing pages (\~15-20 critical pages) post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Blog Performance and Metrics

  - [30 articles published in July (as of meeting date)](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Clicks and impressions trending upward, on track to surpass previous month](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Significant growth in clicks (60%) and impressions (143%) since January 2025](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Top performing content includes social media topics (TikTok, Instagram) and vertical video guide](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Japanese landing page and video showroom product page showing notable click increases](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [New image generation workflow implemented, automating creation of relevant images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Jenn to send next week's topic pitches to Sam for review due to Ritesh's absence](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Reduce meeting cadence to Thursdays only, focusing on performance reporting and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Cameron to update team on resource allocation changes and potential partnership renegotiation](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue async support and SEO guidance through Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Jenn to send next week's content topic pitches to Sam for review](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Cameron to message Dave directly for one-off technical SEO questions](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [GrowthX to prioritize indexing requests for critical Webflow landing pages post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Jenn to schedule a walkthrough of Search Console with Cameron for self-sufficiency](https://fathom.video/share/PyutaiQ-LGZB5csLZ2Ap-AFJB7FQRvF7?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
